C_gate.dchi2_note: <0.5 => per-object Delta-chi2 is ANTI-informative (ranks spurious as MORE binary-like than genuine); not merely uninformative.

verdict_hint: GO if: spurious_rate >> baseline_fpr; per-object Delta-chi2 AUC <= 0.5 (blind/anti-informative); and the HONEST (mismatched-template) gate AUC is well above 0.5 (oracle is an upper bound only).
